content:
✨ 嗨大家好，V2.2.2【窥视灵魂之旅】二创征集获奖名单公布！
感谢大家的精彩创作~奖励将在下周五前发至邮箱
*注：个别作品因不符合投稿规则，故未参与评价。在投稿前请大家仔细阅读投稿规则，感谢理解与支持。

✨ Hi everyone, the list of winners for the V2.2.2 [Gaze into the Soul's Depths] fan art collection has been announced!
Thank you for your creations~The reward will be sent to the email before next Friday

*Note: Some works did not participate in the evaluation due to non-compliance with submission rules. Please read the submission rules carefully before submitting. Thank you for your understanding and support.
活動結束|Event ends🎨V2.2.2版本 同人征集開啟！V2.2.2 Fan Collection Is Open!

💐 嗨大家好，V2.2.2【窥视灵魂之旅】攻略征集获奖名单公布！
感谢大家的精彩创作~奖励将在下周五前发至邮箱

💐 Hi everyone, the list of winners for the V2.2.2 [Gaze into the Soul's Depths] strategy collection has been announced!
Thank you for your creations~The reward will be sent to the email before next Friday
活動結束|Event ends🎯V2.2.2版本 攻略征集開啟！V2.2.2 Game Guide Collection Is Open!
